info.title: qcms admin API
info.description: The internal authoring surface (mounted under /admin): questions, forms, secure links, responses/export/erasure, webhooks, and outbox delivery ops.

message.example: Missing or invalid internal service token

post.summary: Create a question with its first draft version (admin)

201.description: The created question and its first draft version

get.summary: List questions with a latest-version summary; filter by status, search slug/label (admin)

post.summary: Append a new draft version, seeded from the latest (admin)

put.summary: Edit a draft version's definition (admin); published/deprecated are immutable

post.summary: Publish a draft version, freezing its definition (admin)
Deprecate a published version, blocking new pins (admin)

get.summary: Read one question with all its versions (admin)

200.description: The question and every version, oldest first

post.summary: Create a form identity with an empty first draft (admin)

201.description: The created form and its empty draft

get.summary: Read one form: identity, current draft (open or seeded), version summary (admin)

put.summary: Replace the draft definition; returns advisory publish issues (admin)

200.description: The saved draft and advisory validation issues

post.summary: Dry-run publish validation of a definition; no save (admin)
Publish the draft: freeze a snapshot, compile A2UI, persist a version (admin)
Close a form to new sessions; in-flight sessions finish (admin)
Reopen a closed form to new sessions (admin)

get.summary: Read one published version's full snapshot (definition + compiled) (admin)
List submitted responses for a form (paginated, filterable) (admin)

200.description: A page of submitted responses (erased sessions excluded)

get.summary: Read one response: locked answers, audit ledger, content hash (admin)

200.description: The response detail with its append-only answer ledger

get.summary: Export submitted responses as CSV or JSON (streamed) (admin)

200.description: The export stream (text/csv or application/json; erased sessions excluded)

post.summary: Erase a session's response (ADR-17); returns the tombstone (idempotent) (admin)
Release a withheld (flagged) response's outbox event (admin)

200.description: Whether this call released the withheld response.submitted event

post.summary: Mint one or a batch of secure links for a form (admin)

201.description: The minted links, each with its shareable URL and expiry

get.summary: List a form's secure links with lifecycle state (admin)

200.description: The minted links with derived state (active/consumed/expired/revoked)

post.summary: Revoke a secure link; start-session rejects it thereafter (admin)
Configure a webhook for a form; the secret is shown once (admin)

201.description: The created webhook; `secret` is shown exactly once here

put.summary: Update a webhook (url/active) or rotate its secret; new secret shown once (admin)

200.description: The updated webhook; `secret` present only when this call rotated it

delete.summary: Soft-deactivate a webhook (stops delivery; row retained) (admin)

get.summary: List dead-lettered webhook deliveries with attempt history (admin)

post.summary: Reset a dead-lettered delivery for immediate redelivery (admin)

200.description: The delivery, reset to due-now; the next pass re-attempts it
